retry_reason: Not a wrapper; allocation failures may be retried but are not refcount operation failures.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to ensure all ancestor profiles in a hierarchical name exist, creating missing ones. The refcount operations (aa_get_ns, and internal refcount_set inside aa_alloc_null) are incidental side-effects of object creation, not the main goal. The function does not return an acquired reference to the caller.
